title: National consultation on Enhancing Access to Justice for Women Victims of Domestic Violence concludes at NLU Odisha
description: National Law University Odisha (NLUO) successfully hosted a National Consultation of Stakeholders on “Enhancing Access to Justice for Women Victims of Domestic Violence by Rethinking Institutional Structures” on May 30 and 31, 2026, at The Crown, Bhubaneswar. The Stakeholders’ Consultation brought together leading academicians, members of the judiciary, police officials, representatives of government departments, international organisations, civil society groups, and legal practitioners from acr
